name: Boss says my illness isn't work-related since symptoms started at home, now what in Boise?
description: Prove work causation despite home onset.[3]

mainEntity.name: Boss says my illness isn't work-related since symptoms started at home, now what in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: Prove work causation despite home onset.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Prove work was major cause via medical opinion, exposure evidence.[3][5] Off-duty start doesn't bar if job-linked.[2] Key factors: Timeline, no other exposures. Get second opinion; lawyer builds counter-evidence.
